NOODLR.ChatPanel.Title: Noodlr — Dungeon Master
NOODLR.ChatPanel.InputPlaceholder: Talk to the DM… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line)
NOODLR.ChatPanel.NotConfigured: Chat provider not configured. Set the provider, model, and API key in module settings.
NOODLR.Provider.Provider.Name: Provider
NOODLR.Provider.Provider.Hint: OpenRouter (API key) or a custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
NOODLR.Provider.BaseUrl.Name: Custom base URL
NOODLR.Provider.BaseUrl.Hint: Only for the custom provider. The OpenAI-compatible base, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1.
NOODLR.Provider.ApiKey.Name: API key
NOODLR.Provider.ApiKey.Hint: Required for OpenRouter; optional for local custom endpoints.
NOODLR.Provider.Model.Name: Model
NOODLR.Provider.Model.Hint: Model slug/id, e.g. anthropic/claude-3.7-sonnet on OpenRouter.
NOODLR.Settings.Title: Configuration
NOODLR.Settings.Intro: Noodlr is an AI Dungeon Master for Foundry VTT: reliable RAG memory, Foundry-authoritative game state, and deliberate restraint.
NOODLR.Settings.PhaseNote: Provider, Memory (RAG), Prompts, TTS, Image, and Transcription tabs continue to grow across phases.
NOODLR.Settings.Enabled.Name: Enable Noodlr
NOODLR.Settings.Enabled.Hint: Turn Noodlr's features on or off for this world.
NOODLR.Settings.ChatSystemPrompt.Name: Chat system prompt override
NOODLR.Settings.ChatSystemPrompt.Hint: Optional. Overrides the built-in Dungeon Master system prompt. Leave empty to use the default.
NOODLR.Settings.ChatContinueAfterRoll.Hi: After a DM reply that rolls dice, automatically ask the DM to continue once from the authoritative results.
NOODLR.Settings.ChatPromptHint: The Dungeon Master system prompt used for Chat. Edit to override; up to 65,000 characters.
NOODLR.Settings.PromptReset: Chat system prompt reset to the built-in default.
NOODLR.Settings.TestNotConfigured: Chat provider is not configured yet.
NOODLR.Settings.TestEmpty: Provider responded, but with empty content.
NOODLR.Settings.Menu.Name: Noodlr Configuration
NOODLR.Settings.Menu.Label: Configure Noodlr
NOODLR.Keybindings.ToggleChatPanel.Name: Toggle Noodlr chat panel
NOODLR.Keybindings.ToggleChatPanel.Hint: Open or close the Noodlr Dungeon Master chat panel.
